title: WATCH:  Mamdani: No snowball fight ban after NYPD officers pelted with snow
fullText: Mamdani: No snowball fight ban after NYPD officers pelted with snowA viral incident between New Yorkers and NYPD officers during Monday's blizzard has snowballed into Mayor Zohran Mamdani's first test with the police brass.February 25, 2026
summary: A viral incident between New Yorkers and NYPD officers during Monday's blizzard has snowballed into Mayor Zohran Mamdani's first test with the police brass.
